matches.x: or my brethren and companions’ Bika I will now say, Peace be within thee. é 9 Because of the house of the Lord our God I will seek thy good. .. PSALM CXXMII. Prayer for mercy. A Song of degrees... ..... Ue thee lift I up mine eyes, () thou that dwellest in the heavens.
